text.p: I guess this is what you want us to do. Please find attached my comments to the author and the forms you asked us to fill. I think the one on discourse strategies has too few data for a work of an international magnitude like this. Only 15 texts were analysed claiming that they were not easy to collect. I delete quite a number almost everyday from my hadset. There are also some notable ommisions. I think if the number is increased to about 50 at least, and the writer designs a single table that can accommodate at least half of the texts he/she wants to analyse, it would be better, because in the attempt to develop a table for each text, the author ran into the problem of space and abandoned drawing the table after drawing about six of them and still said 'see the maxim table below when infact there was no table. There were some other things that I noted in the attached document but you are free to delete any that you don't really agree with.
